'''Or Tuma''' was the outermost [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Orbit/Legends|orbiting]] the [[Star/Legends|star]] [[Ryloth (star)/Legends|Ryloth]] in the [[Ryloth system/Legends|Ryloth system]]. It was a [[Water/Legends|frozen]] rock located in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].

A small colony of [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'leks]] settled the planet in an attempt to get away from the scorching hot [[Temperature/Legends|temperatures]] of [[Ryloth/Legends|Ryloth]].

{{Planet-stub}}
